description: Truncates the signal range (on both ends) using the Value as limit

parameterGroups.label: Operation
parameterGroups.rationale: Single Value parameter controlling the math operation: clamp to [-value, value]

gaps.question: The opSingle path multiplies s by the clamped value instead of just clamping. In what container configurations does the frame path get used vs the block path?
gaps.context: Users need to know whether this bug affects their use case depending on the container context (fix_block vs chain).

notes: Known bug: the frame-processing path (opSingle) computes s *= jlimit(-value, value, s) instead of s = jlimit(-value, value, s). The block path correctly uses vclip. This means clip behaves differently depending on whether it is in a frame-based or block-based container.
